title: Enable Gmail integrations by selecting an alias
excerpt:
Automated emailing from an integration is carried out natively from the @ email of the associated GMAIL account (via the connection). 
Would it be possible to select one of the aliases associated with the connected Gmail…

posts.author: stephane.degaillande (Stéphane de GAILLANDE)
posts.cookedHtml:
Automated emailing from an integration is carried out natively from the @ email of the associated GMAIL account (via the connection).
Would it be possible to select one of the aliases associated with the connected Gmail account? In this way you can target any replies to Google Groups (such as collaborative inboxes or simple mailing lists).
Thank you!

posts.author: NoahM (Noah)
posts.cookedHtml: This feature would be extremely valuable for my team

posts.author: stratcann (Heather)
posts.cookedHtml: This feature would be extremely value for our team as well.

posts.author: RobinD (Robin DuBroy)
posts.cookedHtml: I would love to have this feature! We have several staff members that toggle between the main email and the alias. It would be great to be able to choose the alias in the send from feature within the Monday email.
